scripts.build:all: yarn next build apps/crew && yarn next build apps/flight-simulator && yarn next build apps/navigation && yarn next build apps/ticket-booking && yarn next build apps/warp-drive-manager
scripts.e2e:all: yarn playwright test -c apps/crew-e2e/playwright.config.ts && yarn playwright test -c apps/flight-simulator-e2e/playwright.config.ts && yarn playwright test -c apps/navigation-e2e/playwright.config.ts && yarn playwright test -c apps/ticket-booking-e2e/playwright.config.ts && yarn playwright test -c apps/warp-drive-manager-e2e/playwright.config.ts
scripts.e2e:all:affected: yarn playwright test --only-changed=$NX_BASE -c apps/crew-e2e/playwright.config.ts && yarn playwright test --only-changed=$NX_BASE -c apps/flight-simulator-e2e/playwright.config.ts && yarn playwright test --only-changed=$NX_BASE -c apps/navigation-e2e/playwright.config.ts && yarn playwright test --only-changed=$NX_BASE -c apps/ticket-booking-e2e/playwright.config.ts && yarn playwright test --only-changed=$NX_BASE -c apps/warp-drive-manager-e2e/playwright.config.ts
